positive: A stylized, symmetrical cosmic forest scene, featuring bioluminescent flora and crystalline geometric structures growing from a dark, nebula-filled ground. The composition is centered and vertically balanced. The style should be a blend of psychedelic art and highly detailed linocut etching, emphasizing strong, clean silhouettes against a vibrant backdrop of deep purples, electric blues, and emerald greens. Use high contrast lighting to make the glowing elements pop, giving it an ethereal, dreamlike, and highly graphic aesthetic suitable for apparel transfer. Focus on interlocking, repeating patterns and natural forms.
